titleStmt.title: SII 26.241: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 241. (A.R. No. 229 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAMĀDĒVI, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged. It records a gift of land for the service of tiruvottasāma to the god Kshēttira-pālappiḷḷaiyār in the temple of Kulaiśēkharaīśvaramuḍaiyār of Śōḻamādēvinallūr in Karaivaḻi-nāḍu, by the king on the request of the same individual who figures in Nos. 239 and 240 above. Among the lands forming the boundaries of the gift-land is mentioned one which belonged to a certain Danmapālaṉ of Dēvadāṉakkuḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiruveḻuttiṭṭuc cellāniṉṟa tirunelli � 2 10 1vatu karaivaḻi nāṭṭuc coḻamātevi nallūr yār kulaicekara Īcuvaramuṭaiyār koyilil kṣettirapālappiḷḷaiyāṟ tacāmappaṭikku I
vvūr manṟāṭi pūcakarilaraicaṉ paṟaiyanāṉa cūttirarāyanāṉa po tamiḻaṉ nam pakkale vantu Amu yillaiyeṉ yeṟṟu Uḷvāykkāl piṟavāykkālāka viṭukiṟa kā nilattukku El
laiyāvatu tevatāṉakkuṭi taṉmapālaṉ kāṇikku meṟkum kārai �ḻippoyalukku vaṭakkum meṟ yāṉa ṟe vāykkoṭṭattukkuk kiḻakkum piṇam pokiyiṭa teṟkum Innāṉ
kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa vitai Aiññāḻi nelvitai Uṭpaṭa viṭṭa namolaiku Intavitai Aiṅkuṟuṇikku miṟai puravu cittāyam me vai Eppeṟpaṭṭatu
koḷḷātom cantirātittavaṟ celvatākavum panmāyecura Irakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.241 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
